summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for X=pi by Carbi NEW Cyber Tools module (14 REAL functional tools). All 21 test cases passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: All 14 Cyber Tools are REAL functional tools making actual network/crypto operations - not mocked
Port Scanner uses async TCP connections for real port scanning
DNS Lookup uses dnspython library for real DNS queries (A, MX, NS, TXT records)
WHOIS uses python-whois library for real domain registration data
Hash Generator correctly generates MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512 hashes
Hash Cracker uses dictionary attack against 70+ common passwords
Encoder/Decoder supports Base64, Hex, URL, ROT13, Binary, Morse operations
JWT Decoder properly decodes header and payload from JWT tokens
Password Generator uses cryptographic secrets module for secure generation
Password Analyzer checks against common password list and calculates entropy
Subnet Calculator uses ipaddress module for correct network math
HTTP Header Inspector uses httpx for real header fetching with security grading
TCP Ping measures actual connection latency
Reverse IP uses socket.gethostbyaddr for real reverse DNS lookups
seed_data_creation: None - tests use real network operations and crypto functions
